text:

From-To: open->feedback

I committed a fix for md deadlocks, namely 
1.153.2.8   +9 -0      src/sys/dev/md/md.c                                     
1.491.2.10  +9 -1      src/sys/kern/vfs_bio.c                                  
1.304.2.8   +1 -0      src/sys/sys/vnode.h 
Please, report whether it helps.
